title: If I Were a Boy
album: I AM...SASHA FIERCE NEW DELUXE EDITION
why_this_song: If I Were a Boy by Beyoncé (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: How it feels to love a girl
I swear I'd be a better man
And everything you had got destroyed
I would turn off my phone

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cause" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wanted" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wanted" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'd roll outta bed in the mornin'
And everything you had got destroyed

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And throw on what I wanted, then go
'Cause I know that she'd be faithful
Think I'd forgive you like that

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "If I Were a Boy" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "If I Were a Boy" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "If I Were a Boy" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "If I Were a Boy" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "If I Were a Boy" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "If I Were a Boy"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
